top_signals.title: Typhoon Bavi brings rains and wind to Okinawa as Taiwan evacuates thousands
top_signals.summary: Taiwan's government evacuated more than 14,000 people ⁠from mainly mountainous areas as the island shut down for the medium strength Typhoon Bavi.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
